CONTENT.Club career: Tunjov started out playing for hometown team Narva Trans. In March 2018, he joined SPAL academy. Tunjov made his debut in the Serie A on 15 December 2019, coming on as a 73rd-minute substitute in the 1–3 away loss to Roma.On 13 February 2020 he signed his first professional contract with SPAL, lasting until 30 June 2023.In August 2021, Tunjov joined Serie C club Carrarese on a loan deal.

CONTENT.Career statistics: As of match played 24 February 2024As of 26 September 2022.

SUMMARY: Georgi Tunjov (born 17 April 2001) is an Estonian professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Serie C club Pescara.
